TSP Planning

Overview TSP Funds TSP Advantages Strategy FAQ
TSP Planning

Strategic

TSP Management

The Thrift Savings Plan is one of America's best retirement savings vehicles, but most federal employees don't maximize its potential. Strategic fund allocation, contribution optimization, and withdrawal planning can add hundreds of thousands to your retirement security.

Optimize My TSP

"The TSP is the most powerful tax-advantaged savings vehicle available to federal employees."

Mike Stevens, IAR
2026 Contribution Limit
$24,500 (+ $8K catch-up)
Super Catch-Up (60-63)
+$11,250 additional
Agency Match Maximum
5% of salary
TSP Expense Ratio
0.057% (extremely low)
Average TSP Balance
$780,000 at retirement

Six Core TSP Funds

The TSP offers remarkably low-cost access to six professionally managed funds covering the full spectrum of investment options from guaranteed safety to international growth.

G
Government Securities

Guaranteed principal and interest. Risk-free but low returns.

F
Fixed Income Index

Tracks US bond market. Moderate risk, income focus.

C
Common Stock Index

Tracks S&P 500. Core US stock exposure.

S
Small Cap Stock Index

Small and mid-cap US stocks. Higher growth potential.

I
International Stock Index

International developed markets. Geographic diversification.

L
Lifecycle Funds

Target-date funds that adjust allocation automatically.

The Advantage

TSP Superiority.

Cost Advantage

Unbeatable Fees

TSP Expense Ratio 0.057%
Average 401(k) Fees 1.20%
Annual Savings on $500K $5,715/year

The TSP's incredibly low fees mean more of your money stays invested and compounds over time. On a $500,000 balance, you save over $5,700 annually compared to typical 401(k) plans.

Strategic Benefits

Unique Advantages

The TSP offers benefits unavailable in private sector 401(k) plans, making it one of the most valuable employee benefits in America.

  • Unique G Fund guaranteed returns
  • Age 55 penalty-free access
  • Generous agency matching formula
  • Both traditional and Roth options
  • Institutional-quality fund management
  • Strong fraud protection measures
  • Super catch-up for ages 60-63
  • Lifetime income annuity options
Strategic Coordination

Beyond Fund
Selection

Smart TSP management goes beyond picking funds. It requires coordinating contribution strategies, tax decisions, withdrawal planning, and rollover analysis to maximize lifetime value alongside your FERS pension and Social Security.

Roth vs Traditional Strategy

Federal employees have unique considerations for Roth versus traditional contributions. We model your current and projected retirement tax brackets to optimize your contribution mix.

Withdrawal Sequencing

The order you withdraw from different accounts in retirement dramatically affects your tax burden. Coordinate TSP, FERS, and Social Security for optimal tax efficiency.

Common Questions

TSP Planning FAQ

Essential information about maximizing your Thrift Savings Plan and strategic TSP management for federal employees.

Optimize My TSP

Ready to maximize your TSP potential?

Your TSP is one of America's best retirement savings vehicles. Schedule a comprehensive analysis to ensure you're maximizing contributions, optimizing fund allocation, and planning strategic withdrawals.
